name: Node.js Express API
description: Creates a basic Node.js Express API with a layered structure.

commands.command: mkdir {{projectName}} && cd {{projectName}} && npm init -y && npm install express && mkdir -p src/routes src/controllers src/services

echo 'const express = require("express"); const app = express(); const port = 3000; app.get("/", (req, res) => res.send("Hello World!")); app.listen(port, () => console.log(`Example app listening on port ${port}!`));' > {{projectName}}/src/index.js
